certification_rule: Node must appear in top-5 hub ranking in at least 2 of 3 sources to be CONFIRMED; must appear in all 3 to be CERTIFIED CONSENSUS
metric: IRDME hub degree rank (single-layer physical_interaction per source)
rationale: TP53 and MDM2 are the canonical p53 pathway hubs: TP53 is the master regulator with known direct interactions with most pathway members; MDM2 is the primary negative regulator (direct binding, E3 ligase). Both appear as top-ranked hubs in STRING v12 and Curated Literature physical_interaction layers (built before IntAct download). Prediction is made before running IRDME compare API. BRCA1/ATM/CDKN1A predicted CONFIRMED (appear in 2 of 3 sources top-5) but database-methodology-dependent (IntAct vs STRING/Curated may diverge).
target_dataset: p53 pathway (15 nodes: tp53, mdm2, mdmx, atm, atr, chek1, chek2, brca1, pcna, cdkn1a, bax, bcl2, crebbp, rb1, e2f1)
title: Multi-Source Protein Hub Certification: STRING v12 + IntAct + Curated Literature
